name: Pushnami
description: Pushnami — web push messaging platform with monetization, audience growth, and segmentation for publishers and marketers.

seo.title: Pushnami — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Pushnami: Pushnami — web push messaging platform with monetization, audience growth, and segmentation for publishers and marketers.

when_to_use: Monetizing web push subscribers via integrated ad network
Growing push subscriber lists for media publishers
Segmented web push campaigns for publisher retention

cons: Web push is a declining acquisition channel
Less polish than iZooto or OneSignal
review.verdict: Niche publisher-focused web push — worth testing against iZooto, but web push upside is thinning overall.
review.best_for: Content publishers monetizing large opt-in audiences
